description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds Doxygen documentation and deploys it to GitHub Pages. The workflow triggers on push to main and on pull request events. For pull requests labeled 'documentation', it checks out the code, installs Clang, Doxygen, and Graphviz, generates Doxygen documentation, and deploys a preview to a PR-specific folder on GitHub Pages. It also posts and updates comments with preview links and deployment status.
